title: thymus serpyllum f. piligerus
intro: Thymus serpyllum f. piligerus, also known as creeping thyme, is a low-growing, spreading evergreen shrub that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and antiseptic properties, which make it effective against a range of bacterial and fungal infections. The health benefits of Thymus serpyllum f. piligerus include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and improve respiratory health, making it a popular natural remedy for coughs, colds, and bronchitis. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be applied topically or taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
